name: Sigiriya Village Hotel
description: An eco-friendly luxury resort nestled in nature just minutes from Sigiriya Rock, offering stunning views and authentic Sri Lankan hospitality.

name: Ella Jungle Resort
description: Perched in the hills of Ella with panoramic mountain and valley views. A perfect base for exploring the tea country and hiking trails.

name: Kandy House
description: A stunning colonial-era manor house turned boutique hotel, set in a lush garden just outside Kandy with timeless elegance and impeccable service.

name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
description: Sri Lanka's premier wildlife lodge located inside Yala National Park, offering intimate safari experiences with expert naturalist guides.

name: Fort Bazaar
description: A beautifully restored Dutch colonial mansion inside Galle Fort, blending heritage architecture with contemporary luxury.

name: Tea Bush Hotel
description: Surrounded by tea bushes at high altitude, this cozy hotel offers a fireplace retreat with authentic Ceylonese tea experiences.

name: Mirissa Hills
description: A breezy hilltop retreat above Mirissa Bay with ocean views, whale watching packages, and easy access to the beach.

name: Ulagalla Resort
description: An extraordinary heritage resort spread across a 58-acre private estate near the ancient city, offering an immersive Cultural Triangle experience.
